Instance Property# biometry

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+visionOS 2.0+watchOS 11.0+

```
var biometry: LAEnvironment.MechanismBiometry? { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/localauthentication/laenvironment/state-swift.class/biometry#discussion)

Information about biometric authentication (Touch ID, Face ID or Optic ID).

@c nil if biometry is not supported by this device.
